main.description: Public key for verifying card mint signatures. Published on the mint PDS as a convenience, but also embedded in the game client and git repo. Verification never requires the mint PDS to be online. Record key is 'current'.

publicKeyMultibase.description: Public key in multibase encoding (base58btc with 'z' prefix, matching DID doc conventions)

publicKeyHex.description: Public key as hex string (for easy use in browser crypto)

note.description: Human-readable note about the key (e.g., 'Wiki Cards mint key v1')
